Maintain a compact working world model of what the current level seems to contain, what actions appear to do, what the goal seems to be, what is still uncertain, and what plan currently looks best.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

before_nodes = before.segmentation['nodes']
after_nodes = after.segmentation['nodes']

# Find non-trivial nodes (pixels > 4) in both frames
print("Before (non-trivial):")
for n in before_nodes:
    if n['pixels'] > 4:
        r0, c0 = n['boundary'][0]
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, pos=({r0},{c0})")

print("\nAfter (non-trivial):")
for n in after_nodes:
    if n['pixels'] > 4:
        r0, c0 = n['boundary'][0]
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, pos=({r0},{c0})")
</parameter>
